notes: with_skill achieves 100% pass rate across all 3 evals; without_skill averages 87% — delta is +13%.

The skill's main differentiators: (1) always reads and states vault name from config.local.yml, (2) structured per-note relevance assessment in the output template, (3) explicit 'Nächste Schritte' as questions with GO-Prinzip.
without_skill already handles no-result cases well (eval 2: 100% pass). The skill adds no value there.
without_skill fails on vault-name-mention (eval 0) and per-note-relevance-assessment (eval 1) — both are structural choices the skill enforces.
The no-result case (eval 2) is non-discriminating: both configs score 100%. The skill's value shows in structured output and config-driven vault targeting, not in no-result handling.
